allow: Bash(do echo "=== $file ===" sed -n '/^export async function POST/,+5p' "$file")
Bash(lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1 && npx next dev --port 3000 2>&1)
Bash(which supabase 2>/dev/null && supabase --version 2>/dev/null || echo "supabase CLI not found in PATH")
Bash(dpkg -l | grep -i postgresql-client 2>/dev/null | head -3; apt list --installed 2>/dev/null | grep -i psql | head -3; echo "---"; which pg_isready 2>/dev/null || echo "no pg tools")
